Localization.Description: A directory is created via the web interface

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created the directory "{object.name}" in branch "{datafield3}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create the directory "{object.name}" in branch "{datafield3}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
